deprecations.replacement: Use 'docker compose' (V2 plugin) — the standalone docker-compose binary (V1) is deprecated since July 2023 and no longer maintained
Use Docker networks instead of --link — legacy container linking is deprecated and does not work with Docker Swarm or Compose V2 networks
Use LABEL org.opencontainers.image.authors='name' — MAINTAINER instruction is deprecated since Docker 1.13
The legacy builder (DOCKER_BUILDKIT=0) is deprecated since Docker 23.0 — BuildKit is the default and only supported builder
Compose file format version 2.x is deprecated — use the top-level format without a version key (Compose V2 infers the format)
The explicit version key in Compose files is deprecated — Compose V2 infers the format automatically; remove the version field
Consider using 'docker buildx build' for advanced features (multi-platform, remote builders, advanced caching) — docker build delegates to BuildKit but lacks buildx-specific features
AUFS and devicemapper storage drivers are deprecated — use overlay2 (default since Docker 18.09)
Live restore is not compatible with Docker Swarm mode — use standalone daemon config for live restore
ADD with remote URLs is deprecated in Dockerfile — use COPY with a preceding RUN curl/wget for explicit control and caching
